title: Microsoft Excel Formulas & Functions
description: A deep dive into Excel's powerful formula library. Learn text, date, logical, and financial functions to manipulate and analyze data effectively. This course bridges the gap between basic spreadsheet usage and advanced data modeling.

seo_metadata.title: Excel Formulas & Functions Certificate | ProCerix
seo_metadata.description: Master Excel formulas and functions. Learn text manipulation, date functions, financial calculations, and logical testing.

learning_outcomes: Manipulate and clean text data using text functions
Perform complex date and time calculations
Combine multiple functions to solve business problems
Troubleshoot and fix common formula errors (#VALUE, #N/A)
Apply financial functions for investment analysis

modules.title: Text and Data Cleaning
modules.description: Functions to clean, split, and join text data.

lessons.title: Text Manipulation Functions
lessons.content:
Cleaning Text Data

Use TRIM to remove extra spaces, and UPPER, LOWER, or PROPER to standardize text casing.

lessons.title: Extracting Text
lessons.content:
LEFT, RIGHT, and MID

These functions allow you to extract specific characters from a text string. For example, LEFT(A1, 3) extracts the first three characters.

lessons.title: Joining Text
lessons.content:
CONCATENATE and TEXTJOIN

Combine text from multiple cells. TEXTJOIN is the modern approach as it allows you to specify a delimiter and ignore empty cells.

modules.title: Date, Time, and Financials
modules.description: Working with dates and financial modeling.

lessons.title: Date and Time Functions
lessons.content:
Working with Dates

Excel stores dates as serial numbers. Use TODAY() and NOW() for current dates, and DATEDIF to calculate the difference between two dates.

lessons.title: Financial Functions
lessons.content:
PMT and FV

The PMT function calculates payments for a loan based on constant payments and a constant interest rate. FV calculates the future value of an investment.

modules.title: Auditing and Error Handling
modules.description: Techniques for finding and fixing errors in your formulas.

lessons.title: Understanding Error Codes
lessons.content:
Common Errors

Learn to identify errors like #N/A (value not available), #VALUE! (wrong data type), and #DIV/0! (division by zero).

lessons.title: Using IFERROR
lessons.content:
Handling Errors Gracefully

The IFERROR function allows you to specify a custom result if a formula evaluates to an error, keeping your spreadsheet clean.

mcqs.question: Which function removes extra spaces from text?
Which function extracts a specific number of characters starting from the left of a string?
What function is an improvement over CONCATENATE because it handles delimiters?
How does Excel store dates internally?
Which function returns the current date and time?
Which financial function calculates the payment for a loan?
What error appears when you try to divide a number by zero?
Which function can trap and handle formula errors?
If you want to capitalize only the first letter of each word, which function should you use?
What does the FV function calculate?
